sectionTitle: Built for Production, Designed for Trust
sectionSubtitle: HeadyCloud's reliability posture is not an afterthought — it is an architectural property, engineered into every layer of the stack.

slo.uptimeNote: Measured as API availability across all active regions, rolling 30-day window
slo.latencyNote: API gateway to response, measured from us-central1 origin
slo.rpoNote: Recovery Point Objective — maximum data loss in catastrophic regional failure
slo.rtoNote: Recovery Time Objective — maximum time to restore service after catastrophic failure

certifications.name: SOC 2 Type II
certifications.scope: Security, Availability, Confidentiality trust service criteria

certifications.name: GDPR Compliance
certifications.scope: EU data residency via eu-west1, Data Processing Agreement available

certifications.name: NIST Post-Quantum Cryptography
certifications.scope: FIPS 203 (Kyber-768) and FIPS 204 (Dilithium2) for all agent communications

guarantees.title: 99.99% Uptime SLA
guarantees.description: Enterprise plans include contractual uptime guarantees with financial SLA credits for any month that falls below 99.99% availability. Credits are calculated as a percentage of monthly spend and applied automatically.

guarantees.title: 11-Nine Data Durability
guarantees.description: All vector store data is replicated across 3+ availability zones with 99.999999999% (11 nines) annual durability, matching Google Cloud Storage's durability guarantees. Cross-region replication is enabled for Enterprise plans with < 1 minute RPO.

guarantees.title: Quantum-Safe Security
guarantees.description: All data in transit is encrypted with TLS 1.3 augmented with CRYSTALS-Kyber-768 post-quantum key encapsulation. All data at rest is encrypted with AES-256-GCM. Agent identity certificates are signed with Dilithium2. HeadyCloud is designed to remain secure against quantum adversaries through the 2030s.

guarantees.title: Zero-Downtime Deployments
guarantees.description: All production deployments use automated blue/green traffic shifting with canary analysis. If a new deployment increases error rates above 0.1% or p99 latency by 20%, HeadyCloud automatically rolls back without human intervention within 60 seconds.
